import React from 'react'; import './Projects.css'; const Projects = () => { const projects = [ { id: 1, title: "AI-Powered E-commerce Platform", description: "A full-stack e-commerce solution with AI-powered product recommendations, chatbot support, and intelligent search functionality.", technologies: ["React", "Node.js", "TensorFlow", "MongoDB", "Python"], image: "🛒", link: "#", github: "#" }, { id: 2, title: "Machine Learning Dashboard", description: "Interactive dashboard for visualizing machine learning models, data analysis, and real-time predictions with beautiful charts.", technologies: ["Python", "Streamlit", "Scikit-learn", "Plotly", "Pandas"], image: "📊", link: "#", github: "#" }, { id: 3, title: "Smart Home Automation", description: "IoT-based home automation system with AI voice control, smart scheduling, and energy optimization algorithms.", technologies: ["Python", "TensorFlow", "IoT", "Flask", "SQLite"], image: "🏠", link: "#", github: "#" }, { id: 4, title: "Real-time Chat Application", description: "Modern chat application with real-time messaging, file sharing, and AI-powered content moderation.", technologies: ["React", "Socket.io", "Node.js", "MongoDB", "Express"], image: "💬", link: "#", github: "#" }, { id: 5, title: "Computer Vision API", description: "RESTful API for image recognition, object detection, and facial analysis using deep learning models.", technologies: ["Python", "OpenCV", "TensorFlow", "FastAPI", "Docker"], image: "👁️", link: "#", github: "#" }, { id: 6, title: "Portfolio Website", description: "Modern, responsive portfolio website showcasing projects and skills with smooth animations and elegant design.", technologies: ["React", "CSS3", "JavaScript", "HTML5", "Framer Motion"], image: "🎨", link: "#", github: "#" } ]; return (
